registry_refs.notes: Registry rank 158 with active WordPress rows.
Existing sitemap records sites/19 PDFs and .published_author bylines.

publication_scope.notes: WordPress subsite on a host shared by multiple Georgetown journals; sites/19 is the upload-scope guard.

evidence.notes: No rule disallows /immigration-law-journal/ or sites/19 uploads.
One page contains issue sections and article links from volume 40 number 3 (Spring 2026) through volume 32 number 1 (Fall 2017), including Articles and Note(s) headings.
Newest issue article landing page was reachable and contained a direct sites/19 PDF URL. Existing curated sitemap identifies h1 title and .published_author byline selectors.
Single bounded smoke returned PDF magic bytes and 460,090 bytes; server ignored Range and returned the complete article PDF.

reconnaissance.notes: Three loops covered robots, the complete visible archive page, and one newest article/file. Historical article-page markup remains inferred from the single archive layout rather than separately fetched.

include: Print issues and article pages under /immigration-law-journal/in-print/
exclude: online-only material outside In Print unless separately scoped
scope.notes: Require both the journal path and sites/19 upload prefix.

nodes.notes: Issue sections and article links on one page.
HTML detail page with title/byline and PDF link.

edges.notes: Nearest preceding volume heading supplies volume, number, season, and year; deduplicate navigation/content repetitions.

archive_patterns.notes: Issue metadata is encoded in the ancestor slug and archive heading.
Upload year must not override issue year without corroboration.

pagination.termination: Single observed page ends at volume 32 number 1 (Fall 2017).
pagination.notes: No next control observed; earlier backfile is not visible here.

layout_eras.label: Single-page Georgetown In Print layout
layout_eras.notes: Archive exposes all visible eras on one page; only one article detail was fetched.

sources.example: Deportations to Perilous Places: Protecting Against Third Country Removal in Immigration Court
sources.notes: Article h1 is the detail-page authoritative source.

title.missingness: Present on observed archive article links.

sources.example: Byline selector documented in the existing curated sitemap
sources.notes: The name text was not retained in this bounded parser output; verify before collection.

authors.missingness: Selector is established, but the representative name value was not captured.

sources.notes: Distinguish a formal abstract from HTML article body before labeling.

abstract.missingness: Not retained in the bounded parser output.

sources.locator: nearest preceding issue heading or ancestor issue slug
season and year in issue heading

patterns.notes: Direct sites/19 article PDF; Range ignored on smoke.

validation.notes: Response began %PDF-1.7; filename 40.3-Elman-Welch and article landing context indicate article granularity.

access.politeness_notes: Robots first; three bounded loops; only one representative PDF fetched and no bulk traversal.

verdict.summary: The unpaginated In Print page exposes issues and article links for 2017-2026, and the representative sites/19 article PDF smoke passed.
blockers: Pre-2017 backfile is not visible on the live archive.
Representative author and abstract text values were not retained and need a selector smoke.
verdict.next_action: Run a selector-only smoke on one newest, middle, and oldest visible article, then search for a publication-scoped pre-2017 archive route.
verdict.recommended_adapter: WordPressAcademicBaseAdapter with Georgetown In Print selectors
verdict.implementation_notes: Segment article links by nearest volume heading, use .published_author for bylines, scope PDFs to sites/19, and do not infer publication year from upload path.
